title: crab configuration
description: Schema for crab.yaml — the CRAB (Certificate Root Anchor Builder) configuration file.

version.description: Config file format version. Currently only 1 is supported.

sources.description: Named certificate sources. Each key is the source name used in profile 'sources' lists.

profiles.description: Output profiles. Each key is the profile name passed to 'crabctl build'.

type.description: Source type: 'igtf' for IGTF bundles, 'local' for local files/directories, 'system' for OS trust store.

source_igtf.description: IGTF source: load trust anchors from a local directory, tarball, or HTTPS URL.

path.description: Path to an existing IGTF certificates directory (e.g. /etc/grid-security/certificates).

tarball.description: Path to a local IGTF preinstalled-bundle .tar.gz file.

url.description: HTTPS URL of an IGTF preinstalled-bundle .tar.gz file. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

cache_dir.description: Directory for caching downloaded tarballs. Supports ${VAR:-default} interpolation.

policies.description: IGTF policy tags to include. Omit to accept all.

source_local.description: Local source: load PEM certificates from a file, directory, or glob pattern.

path.description: Path to a PEM file, a PEM bundle, or a directory of certificates.

pattern.description: Glob pattern(s) for files within a directory source.

recursive.description: Recurse into subdirectories when path is a directory.

source_system.description: System source: auto-detect the OS CA trust bundle.

path.description: Override the auto-detected bundle path. Omit to use platform auto-detection.

profile.description: An output profile: a named combination of sources, policy, and output settings.

sources.description: List of source names (defined in the top-level 'sources' block) to include.

staging_path.description: Temporary staging directory for atomic builds. Defaults to output_path + '.staging'.

atomic.description: Write to a staging directory then atomically rename into place.

output_format.description: Output format: OpenSSL CApath directory, concatenated PEM bundle, or PKCS#12 file.

pkcs12_password.description: Passphrase for PKCS#12 output. Empty string = no encryption. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

rehash.description: Subject-hash computation mode: 'auto' tries openssl then builtin.

annotate_bundle.description: Add subject/fingerprint comments to each PEM block in bundle output.

write_symlinks.description: Write subject-name symlinks (.0, .1 …) alongside hashed certificate files.

include_igtf_meta.description: Copy IGTF .info, .signing_policy, .namespaces, and .crl_url sidecar files to the output.

include_crls.description: Fetch and store CRL files alongside the certificate files.

file_mode.description: Octal permission mode for written files. Accepts bare integers (420) or octal strings ("0o644").

dir_mode.description: Octal permission mode for created directories.

policy.description: Certificate selection policy for this profile.

reject_expired.description: Exclude certificates whose notAfter is in the past.

reject_not_yet_valid.description: Exclude certificates whose notBefore is in the future.

require_ca_flag.description: Exclude certificates that lack BasicConstraints CA=TRUE.

reject_path_len_zero.description: Exclude intermediate CAs with pathLen=0 (cannot sign further CAs).

server_auth_only.description: Only include certificates that have the serverAuth Extended Key Usage.

client_auth_only.description: Only include certificates that have the clientAuth Extended Key Usage.

include.description: Explicit include rules. If non-empty, a certificate must match at least one rule.

exclude.description: Explicit exclude rules. A certificate matching any rule is dropped.

warn.description: Warn rules. Certificates matching any rule are included but flagged with a WARN outcome. Surfaces via --strict-warnings (exit 3) and WARNING log messages.

policy_rule.description: A single policy match rule. Multiple keys within one rule are ANDed together.

subject_regex.description: Case-insensitive regex matched against the certificate subject DN string.

source.description: Exact source name. Matches certificates loaded from that source.

igtf_policy.description: IGTF policy tag from the .info sidecar file.

crl_config.description: CRL fetch and freshness settings (active when include_crls: true).

fetch.description: Fetch missing or stale CRLs during a build.

crl_path.description: Directory to write CRL files. Defaults to the profile output_path.

max_age_hours.description: Maximum age (hours) of a CRL's thisUpdate before it is flagged stale. Increase for CAs that publish weekly CRLs (e.g. 168).

min_remaining_hours.description: Warn when a CRL's nextUpdate is less than this many hours away. Complements max_age_hours: use it to catch CRLs that are about to expire regardless of their issue date.

refetch_before_expiry_hours.description: Skip re-fetching a CRL that still has more than this many hours of validity remaining. 0 (default) means always re-fetch. Set to e.g. 48 to avoid unnecessary requests for CAs that publish weekly CRLs.

verify_tls.description: Verify TLS certificates when fetching CRLs over HTTPS.

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout in seconds for CRL fetch requests.

max_workers.description: Maximum number of parallel CRL fetch threads. Set to 1 for serial behaviour.

sources.description: Where to look for CRL distribution point URLs.

level.description: Minimum log level written to stderr.

format.description: Log output format: 'text' for human-readable lines, 'json' for structured JSON (one object per line).

file.description: Optional path to a log file. Log messages are written here in addition to stderr.

refresh_config.description: Scheduling hints used by the bundled systemd timer and cron examples.

schedule.description: Cron expression for scheduled refresh (informational; not executed by crab itself).

timeout.description: Maximum expected run time in seconds before the build is considered stuck.
